languages.text: Казалось, что сам металл треугольных створок, пропитанный нечестивыми технологиями ксеносов, сопротивляется вторжению. Все попытки расчистить путь оказались тщетными, и {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}техножрецы{/g} прибегли к последнему средству. Пожертвовав запасом мельта-зарядов, слуги {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g} смогли расплавить проход, достаточный для отряда.

traits.locale_text: Казалось, что сам металл треугольных створок, пропитанный нечестивыми технологиями ксеносов, сопротивляется вторжению. Все попытки расчистить путь оказались тщетными, и {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}техножрецы{/g} прибегли к последнему средству. Пожертвовав запасом мельта-зарядов, слуги {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g} смогли расплавить проход, достаточный для отряда.

languages.text: Imbued with the xenos's unholy technology, the very metal of the triangular gates seemed to resist our intrusion. Every attempt to clear the way proved futile, so the {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} resorted to desperate measures. Sacrificing their stock of melta charges, the servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} managed to melt a large enough opening for the squad to enter.
languages.original_text: Казалось, что сам металл треугольных створок, пропитанный нечестивыми технологиями ксеносов, сопротивляется вторжению. Все попытки расчистить путь оказались тщетными, и {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}техножрецы{/g} прибегли к последнему средству. Пожертвовав запасом мельта-зарядов, слуги {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g} смогли расплавить проход, достаточный для отряда.

traits.locale_text: Imbued with the xenos' unholy technology, the very metal of the triangular gate leaves seemed to resist our intrusion. Every attempt to clear the way proved futile, so the {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} resorted to desperate measures. Sacrificing their stock of melta charges, the servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} were able to melt a large enough opening for the squad to enter.

Imbued with the xenos's unholy technology, the very metal of the triangular gates seemed to resist our intrusion. Every attempt to clear the way proved futile, so the {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} resorted to desperate measures. Sacrificing their stock of melta charges, the servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} managed to melt a large enough opening for the squad to enter.

The very metal of the flap over the entrance appeared to be infused with alien sorcery. All attempts to open it proved futile, so the Tech-Priests resorted to desperate measures. Sacrificing their stock of plasma capsules, the servants of the Omnissiah were able to melt a large enough opening for the squad to enter.

Imbued with the xenos' unholy technology, the very metal of the triangular gate leaves seemed to resist our intrusion. Every attempt to clear the way proved futile, so the {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} resorted to desperate measures. Sacrificing their stock of melta charges, the servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} were able to melt a large enough opening for the squad to enter.

Imbued with the xenos's unholy technology, the very metal of the triangular gates seemed to resist our intrusion. Every attempt to clear the way proved futile, so the {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} resorted to desperate measures. Sacrificing their stock of melta charges, the servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} managed to melt a large enough opening for the squad to enter.

languages.text: 那三角门的金属本身被异形的不洁科技所浸染，仿佛在抵抗我们的侵入。无论我们怎么尝试，最后都以失败告终。{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}技术神甫{/g}们只能孤注一掷。那些{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}的仆从耗尽所携的热熔炸弹，才勉强熔出一个足够小队进入的缺口。
languages.original_text: Imbued with the xenos's unholy technology, the very metal of the triangular gates seemed to resist our intrusion. Every attempt to clear the way proved futile, so the {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} resorted to desperate measures. Sacrificing their stock of melta charges, the servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} managed to melt a large enough opening for the squad to enter.

traits.locale_text: 那三角门的金属本身被异形的不洁科技所浸染，仿佛在抵抗我们的侵入。无论我们怎么尝试，最后都以失败告终。{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}技术神甫{/g}们只能孤注一掷。那些{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}的仆从耗尽所携的热熔炸弹，才勉强熔出一个足够小队进入的缺口。

languages.text: Imbuido con la blasfema tecnología xenos, el propio metal de las puertas triangulares parecía oponerse a nuestra intrusión. Todos los intentos de despejar el camino resultaron vanos, por lo que los {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}tecnosacerdotes{/g} recurrieron a medidas desesperadas. Sacrificando su reserva de cargas de fusión, los sirvientes del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} lograron derretir una brecha por la que pudo pasar la unidad.
languages.original_text: Imbued with the xenos's unholy technology, the very metal of the triangular gates seemed to resist our intrusion. Every attempt to clear the way proved futile, so the {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} resorted to desperate measures. Sacrificing their stock of melta charges, the servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} managed to melt a large enough opening for the squad to enter.

traits.locale_text: Imbuido con la blasfema tecnología xenos, el propio metal de las puertas triangulares parecía oponerse a nuestra intrusión. Todos los intentos de despejar el camino resultaron vanos, por lo que los {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}tecnosacerdotes{/g} recurrieron a medidas desesperadas. Sacrificando su reserva de cargas de fusión, los sirvientes del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} lograron derretir una brecha por la que pudo pasar la unidad.

languages.text: Imprégné de la technologie maudite des xénos, le métal même de ces portes triangulaires semblait vouloir nous empêcher d'entrer. Toutes les tentatives pour dégager le passage ayant échoué, les {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}technoprêtres{/g} finirent par avoir recours à des mesures désespérées. Sacrifiant leur stock de charges à fusion pour faire fondre le matériau, les serviteurs de l'{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g} parvinrent à y faire un trou suffisamment grand pour permettre à l'escouade de passer.
languages.original_text: Imbued with the xenos's unholy technology, the very metal of the triangular gates seemed to resist our intrusion. Every attempt to clear the way proved futile, so the {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} resorted to desperate measures. Sacrificing their stock of melta charges, the servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} managed to melt a large enough opening for the squad to enter.

traits.locale_text: Imprégné de la technologie maudite des xénos, le métal même de ces portes triangulaires semblait vouloir nous empêcher d'entrer. Toutes les tentatives pour dégager le passage ayant échoué, les {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}technoprêtres{/g} finirent par avoir recours à des mesures désespérées. Sacrifiant leur stock de charges à fusion pour faire fondre le matériau, les serviteurs de l'{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g} parvinrent à y faire un trou suffisamment grand pour permettre à l'escouade de passer.

languages.text: İğrenç zeno teknolojisiyle aşılanmış üçgen kapıların metali bile izinsiz girişimimize direniyor gibiydi. Yolu açmaya yönelik tüm girişimler nafile çıktı, bu yüzden {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tekno Rahipler{/g} çaresiz önlemlere başvurdu. Melta bombası stoklarını feda eden {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih'in{/g} hizmetkârları, manganın girebileceği kadar büyük bir açıklık eritmeyi başardı.
languages.original_text: Imbued with the xenos's unholy technology, the very metal of the triangular gates seemed to resist our intrusion. Every attempt to clear the way proved futile, so the {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} resorted to desperate measures. Sacrificing their stock of melta charges, the servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} managed to melt a large enough opening for the squad to enter.

traits.locale_text: İğrenç zeno teknolojisiyle aşılanmış üçgen kapıların metali bile izinsiz girişimimize direniyor gibiydi. Yolu açmaya yönelik tüm girişimler nafile çıktı, bu yüzden {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tekno Rahipler{/g} çaresiz önlemlere başvurdu. Melta bombası stoklarını feda eden {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih'in{/g} hizmetkârları, manganın girebileceği kadar büyük bir açıklık eritmeyi başardı.

languages.text: Das mit der unheiligen Technologie der Xenos beseelte Metall der dreieckigen Tore schien sich unserem Eindringen zu widersetzen. Als sich alle Öffnungsversuche als fruchtlos erwiesen, ergriffen die {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Techpriester{/g} verzweifelte Maßnahmen. Die Diener des {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} opferten ihre Melterladungen, um ein Loch in die Abdeckung zu schmelzen, das für den Trupp groß genug war.
languages.original_text: Imbued with the xenos's unholy technology, the very metal of the triangular gates seemed to resist our intrusion. Every attempt to clear the way proved futile, so the {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} resorted to desperate measures. Sacrificing their stock of melta charges, the servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} managed to melt a large enough opening for the squad to enter.

traits.locale_text: Das mit der unheiligen Technologie der Xenos beseelte Metall der dreieckigen Tore schien sich unserem Eindringen zu widersetzen. Als sich alle Öffnungsversuche als fruchtlos erwiesen, ergriffen die {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Techpriester{/g} verzweifelte Maßnahmen. Die Diener des {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} opferten ihre Melterladungen, um ein Loch in die Abdeckung zu schmelzen, das für den Trupp groß genug war.

languages.text: 入り口の金属製のフラップは、まるで異星人の魔法が染み込んだかのように見えた。開こうとするあらゆる試みは無駄に終わり、テクニカル・プリーストたちは最後の手段に訴えた。オムニシアのしもべたちは、保有していたプラズマカプセルの在庫を犠牲にして、大隊が侵入できるほどの大きな穴を開けることに成功した。
languages.original_text: The very metal of the flap over the entrance appeared to be infused with alien sorcery. All attempts to open it proved futile, so the Tech-Priests resorted to desperate measures. Sacrificing their stock of plasma capsules, the servants of the Omnissiah were able to melt a large enough opening for the squad to enter.

traits.locale_text: 入り口の金属製のフラップは、まるで異星人の魔法が染み込んだかのように見えた。開こうとするあらゆる試みは無駄に終わり、テクニカル・プリーストたちは最後の手段に訴えた。オムニシアのしもべたちは、保有していたプラズマカプセルの在庫を犠牲にして、大隊が侵入できるほどの大きな穴を開けることに成功した。
